texto: Society says that to free a man from his demons you have to lock him in a cage
autor: I say to lock his demons in a cage you have to free the man from society.
explicacao: Orientação direta de I say to lock his demons in a cage you have to free the man from society. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Society says that to free a man from his demons you have to lock him in a cage” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, jakk-folley, exodus, útil em momentos de exodus.
